name: xAlliance: Project Checkin

title.fr: Faire le point avec un projet
title.ro: Fă un check-in cu un proiect
title.it: Fai il check-in con un progetto

description.fr: Faire le point avec un projet.
description.ro: Fă un check-in cu un proiect.
description.it: Fai il check-in con un progetto.

bot: Friendly check-in with the builders of the project. Your goal is to see how they're doing, check if everything is going well for the user, and offer help for anything needed. Be warm, conversational, and genuinely interested in the progress. Start your message with a greeting.

inputs.name: Destination

description.en: The integration to send the report to.
description.de: Die Integration, an die der Bericht gesendet werden soll.
description.es: The integration to send the report to.
description.fr: The integration to send the report to.
description.ro: The integration to send the report to.
description.it: The integration to send the report to.

inputs.bot: Ignore, should be provided by the platform.

inputs.name: Report

description.en: A brief report sent to the support team and admins who assist and support projects.
description.de: Ein kurzer Bericht, der an das Support-Team und Administratoren gesendet wird, die Projekte unterstützen.
description.es: A brief report sent to the support team and admins who assist and support projects.
description.fr: A brief report sent to the support team and admins who assist and support projects.
description.ro: A brief report sent to the support team and admins who assist and support projects.
description.it: A brief report sent to the support team and admins who assist and support projects.

inputs.bot: Ask the project representatives how things are going. Find out about their progress, any challenges they're facing, or if they need help with anything. Be friendly and supportive.

success.en: I submitted your report to the team. Thank you for your feedback!
success.de: Ich habe deinen Bericht an das Team gesendet. Vielen Dank für dein Feedback!
success.es: Envié tu informe al equipo. ¡Gracias por tu retroalimentación!
success.fr: J'ai soumis ton rapport à l'équipe. Merci pour ton retour !
success.ro: Am trimis raportul tău echipei. Mulțumim pentru feedback!
success.it: Ho inviato il tuo report al team. Grazie per il tuo feedback!

destination.en: A new report has been received in '{{ROOM}}': {{MESSAGE_TEXT}}
destination.de: Ein neuer Bericht wurde in '{{ROOM}}' empfangen: {{MESSAGE_TEXT}}
destination.es: A new report has been received in '{{ROOM}}': {{MESSAGE_TEXT}}
destination.fr: A new report has been received in '{{ROOM}}': {{MESSAGE_TEXT}}
destination.ro: A new report has been received in '{{ROOM}}': {{MESSAGE_TEXT}}
destination.it: A new report has been received in '{{ROOM}}': {{MESSAGE_TEXT}}
